author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Plan: Fix both forward and backward to use GPU-native operations. Forward: dispatch to backend.bmm_f32 (cuBLAS) when input is GPU, then attach BmmBackward. Backward: for grad_A = grad_C @ B^T, use per-batch bmm_f32 with transposed B slices. For grad_B = A^T @ grad_C, use per-batch bmm_f32 with transposed A slices. The backend already has bmm_f32, matmul_f32, and transpose_2d_f32 — use those directly instead of CPU scalar loops.
